name: neon-vector-defense
description: A neon sci-fi tower defense game built with React, TypeScript, Canvas, Firebase, and headless balance simulations.

scripts.test:rules: npm run check:deploy-env && firebase emulators:exec --only firestore "npm run test:rules:run"
scripts.test:functions: npm --prefix functions ci && npm --prefix functions run build && tsx --test tests/functions/*.test.ts
scripts.test:callables: npm --prefix functions ci && npm --prefix functions run build && firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,functions,auth "tsx --test tests/callables/*.test.ts"
scripts.test:security: npm run test:rules && npm run test:worker && npm run test:functions && npm run test:callables
scripts.audit:high: npm run audit:root && npm run audit:functions && npm run audit:worker
scripts.ci: npm run build && npm test && npm run test:jest && npm run meta:sim && npm run perf:quick && npm run balance:gate && npm run test:security && npm run test:engine && npm run typecheck:all && npm run audit:high
scripts.balance:gate: tsx scripts/balance.ts quick --gate --out test-results/balance-gate-report.json && tsx scripts/balance-check.ts --baseline public/balance-report.json --current test-results/balance-gate-report.json
